landing.sub: AI rewrites driving and field-visit notes into formal company logs. Export Excel, PDF, and DOCX. Learn your company form.
landing.trust: Stay signed in · Per-account log history · Smart work-hours routing · PWA
landing.values_title: Capture in the field. Submit at the desk.
landing.values_sub: From personal logs to team-ready documents — less busywork, consistent quality.
landing.v1_body: Capture time and place via GPS. Cut address typing and auto-fill visit lists.
landing.v2_body: Turn driving and field notes into company-tone logs. Export Excel, PDF, and DOCX.
landing.v3_body: Store logs to your account, reopen, edit summary and vehicle, then re-download.
landing.quote: Built for sales, field work, and company vehicles
landing.emotion_body: RoadLog is not a casual memo app —
landing.emotion_strong: it is a work-log product for company submission
landing.final_title: Spend less time on paperwork. More on the work.
landing.final_sub: Try Free first, then expand to Pro or Enterprise when ready.
landing.login_link: Already have an account? Log in
create.title: Write driving log
create.sub: Stamp time & place, add mileage, and let AI finish the log.
create.sub_field: Note visits and results — AI turns them into a formal field report.
field.hint: Even place + purpose is enough for a submission-ready draft.
create.stamp_desc: One tap records the current time and GPS address. Stamp on arrival/departure and visit fields fill themselves.
create.stamp_empty: No stamps yet. Tap “Stamp location now” in the field.
settings.title: My settings
settings.sub: Work hours control smart routing. Language and vehicle defaults live here.
settings.lang_hint: Applied immediately and saved on this device.
settings.work_desc: During work hours: Quick stamp. After hours: log writing screen.
pricing.title: Pro for individuals, Enterprise for teams
contact.title: Feedback & contact
contact.sub: CoreLabs treats your feedback as a product asset. All thoughts welcome.
auth.title: Account
auth.sub: Sign in to save logs, downloads, and settings.
auth.remember_hint: Auto-fills email and password next time you sign in on this device.
auth.name: Name (optional)
care.title: Well done today
toast.work_saved: Work hours saved · smart routing on
